label: Transparent quartz cluster motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent motif source for Morphous Quartz, saved later as /systems/morphous-quartz/motif.png
Primary request: Create one isolated quartz cluster motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: precise quartz crystal cluster from a crystal vein, angular hexagonal points, clear white translucent-looking facets rendered as mostly opaque pearly whites and cool greys so it can be cleanly cut out, subtle rainbow prism flashes in cyan, rose, pale gold, and lavender, sharp mineral edges, elegant component-system precision.
Composition: centered object, three-quarter front view, generous padding, no crop, no ground plane.
Style: polished high-resolution 3D editorial mineral render, crisp silhouette, no text.
Chroma-key requirements: background must be one uniform #00ff00 color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-quartz/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Quartz" / "Quartz" inspired by a quartz crystal cluster in a crystal vein.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
System feel: precise component system, mineral clarity, faceted grid alignment, crisp surfaces, clean information architecture.
Palette: clear white, frosted crystal, pale prism cyan, soft prism rose, pale prism gold, lavender refraction, vein graphite grey, smoky border grey. Use mostly clear white and grey with restrained rainbow prism accents.
Required visible sections: Morphous Quartz, Quartz, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, component inventory table, token inspector tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: clear white crystal background, frosted cards, graphite text, smoky grey borders, cyan primary actions, rose and gold chart accents, lavender focus rings, faceted crystal dividers, subtle prism edge highlights, angular quartz cluster asset preview, 8px radii, quiet precise component-system dashboard layout.

label: Dark-mode design-system board

UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, component inventory table, token inspector tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep smoky graphite background, dark frosted cards, clear white text, smoky grey borders, luminous cyan primary actions, rose and gold chart accents, lavender focus rings, faceted crystal dividers, subtle prism edge glints, angular quartz cluster asset preview, 8px radii, quiet precise component-system dashboard layout.
